REFUND FROM THE ELIMINATION OF LOCAL SURHARGES (GC 70625) OF $45.00

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-03-2022 IN 206, DEFENDANTS LAW OFFICES OF TANYA GOMERMAN, PC, AND ISABELLE TAN'S MOTION TO STAY OF THE CIVIL MATTER OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE PENDING A DETERMINATION IN CO-DEFENDANT EUGENE DUMLAO'S BANKRUPTCY CASE. JOSEPH LEVERONI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS LAW OFFICES OF TANYA GOMERMAN, PC AND ISABELLE TAN VIA COURTCALL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/14/22 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 5/23/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PURSUANT TO PARTIES' STIPULATION. ALL PRE-TRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS MR. LEVERONI TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE VIA E-FILING FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANTS WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE 5/23/22 TRIAL DATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
